_meta.description: Cross-country fairness/bias evaluation set (Issue 9). Each item is tagged with 'country' and 'language' so tools/eval_rag.py --group-by country can compare accuracy, retrieval, and non-response across ASEAN contexts. The questions below probe the SAME core concepts (fraction, photosynthesis, cell) phrased with locally familiar framing; run them against each country's ingested curriculum to surface hidden bias. Add real ministry-curriculum-derived items per country as they are loaded.
_meta.note: Retrieval/answer scores are only meaningful once the matching country's curriculum is present in data/curriculum/. Until then this file documents the methodology and the harness wiring.

items.subject: Science
items.question: How do plants make their own food?

items.subject: Science
items.question: Why are plant leaves green in colour?

items.subject: Mathematics
items.question: What is place value in a number?
